file.original_name: 【#賽馬娛樂新聞】25:26 #26 新見習騎師🏇袁幸堯不日登場🔥 1080p.mp4

segments.text: The following video is sponsored by
The Hong Kong-based
and also attended the press conference.
Let's take a look.
I like coffee shops.
I like everything.
Tofu flower, corn chips,
cats, I love cats.
I love watching New Year's Eve.
So I watch New Year's Eve in South Africa.
New Year's Eve.
Today, the New 10-pounder,
Yuen Hung-Yao, attended the press conference
and shared her interests.
Her positive and positive answers
and her genuine smile
She is very excited.
Her biggest goal is to gain experience
and keep improving.
My strong point is my talent.
I hope I can be more outstanding.
I am still looking for a weak point.
I hope I won't have a weak point.
I will try my best to improve myself.
I always pay attention to every player
because they have their own special points.
and their advantages.
And their way of playing chess is different.
So I hope I can take advantage of their
and their advantages
and put them in my own hands.
On March 8,
the chess player Ai Xiaoli officially became a father.
Her son Thomas was born in Hong Kong
and he is very good at playing chess.
Ai Xiaoli won four games of chess on the day he was born.
Many children and fans
have joined her social media platforms
to give a blessing to the newlyweds.
I hope Thomas will continue to show the nature of a small fortune teller
and lead his father to hit more dice.
The money is all yours.
Besides the
Another chess player
recently performed a great performance
which is the !
On March 7th,
he won six dice
in the South Wing Race Day.
Including the first round,
But some netizens found out that the horse fell off. What happened?
It's the grass.
Everyone was worried that the horse would be hungry after falling off.
So, a group of netizens turned crazy.
Fortunately, this post successfully called the horse-drawn staff to come out.
In addition to helping the horse to recover the lunch,
they also revealed the true identity of the mysterious horse.
This cute and hard-working character
is from the lucky family of the Yodat Wing.
If you pass by the horse field next time,
you can say hello to him.
On March 9, Australian young chess player Stenley
beat the American chess player Milan Wang
to defeat the German Highland Blink
and win the Adelaide Cup.
Two horses had to take pictures of each other
before they could compete.
It was very exciting.
But the end was short-lived.
Stenley, who won the biggest victory
The captain of the ship, Stanley, was thrown off by the American king.
The moment of the rising sun, he instantly became a return to the scene.
Many netizens have tried to turn the new meme into a new one.
Actually, everyone was very happy for him.
Like a few days ago when he took the plane,
besides the promotion of the passenger cabin,
the crew also prepared a special welcome ceremony for him.
All passengers were gathered to celebrate his arrival.
Such a big toast is perfect for a drink.
Next week is the big day of the Hong Kong Cup.
The signing ceremony will be held on March 19.
Please keep an eye on which participants can get the most votes.
We'll be back next week with the latest news.
